The latest _manager/validator-warnings event at promise_ledger.jsonl line 220 is marked superseded/high but has a non-UUID event_id and lacks the required supersedes field. python3 -m long_exposure.tools.promise_check . exits red on both errors, so the canonical promise ledger is structurally invalid until reconciled.

The canonical handoff artifact index is internally valid but stale against the current plan/ledger state. data/handoff_artifact_index.csv represents 24 milestones while the current plan has 41 validated milestones; 17 later validated plan milestones (M-PRODDEPLOY-1, M-TRENDS-1, M-ADAPTER-1, M-PORT-1, M-INTAKE-1, M-ATTEST-1, M-TRUSTPOL-1, M-GATECHAIN-1, M-ROOTINT-1, M-TIMEBASE-1, M-REDACT-1, M-UNCERT-1, M-CAUSAL-1, M-PRODREPLAY-1, M-EVIDART-1, M-LIVECOLLECT-1, M-CLAIMEXP-1) are absent even though their latest ledger events are validated and their latest artifacts exist. A ledger-vs-index probe found 261 concrete non-report ledger artifact paths missing from the index. final_report.md describes the index as mapping every tracked campaign artifact, so the public traceability claim is stale. tests/verify_campaign_handoff.py still passes, showing the verifier does not check current plan/ledger completeness for the artifact index.

reports/cycles/report_cycles_7-9.md preserves the cycle-9 conclusion that M-COMP-1 remained action_required because the corrected compression/offload outputs showed no positive queue-help case. Later ledger line 42 validates M-COMP-1 after the cycle-10 queue-attribution repair under a narrowed claim: compression/offload is useful for capacity, movement/local storage, provenance, and safety boundaries under the current synthetic setup, but not as a queue-threshold-preserving mechanism. The report registration artifacts exist, but the final public record should not rely on the stale M-COMP-1 action_required conclusion without reconciliation.

The registered package archives memory_centric_agentic_inference_package_latest.zip and memory_centric_agentic_inference_package_2026-05-12T0019.zip contain only README.md, report/CURATION.yaml, report/MANIFEST.md, and report/REFERENCES.md. The README caveats curation_complete=false and calls the package intentionally incomplete, but its verification instructions still direct readers to report/final_report.pdf or final_report.md, neither of which exists in the archive. The archive manifest is a cycles 19-21 snapshot while the live ledger continued through later validated milestones. This is not a core research-artifact failure because the live workspace contains the final report and data, but it is a misleading registered handoff/package artifact.
